site.tagline: Free in-browser image tools — your files never leave your device.

tools.title: HEIC to JPG Converter — Free, Private, In-Browser
tools.sub: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to universal JPG. Batch supported. Free forever.
tools.metaDesc: Convert HEIC (iPhone photos) to JPG online for free. Batch convert, adjustable quality, and your files never leave your device — 100% private, no upload.
tools.drop: Drop HEIC files here or click to choose

seo.h2: How to convert HEIC to JPG
seo.p: Drag your .heic or .heif files into the box above, pick a quality level, and each photo is instantly converted to a downloadable JPG. Convert many at once and grab them with Download all.

seo.h2: Why are my iPhone photos in HEIC?
seo.p: Since iOS 11, iPhones save photos in HEIC to reduce file size. It's great on Apple devices but many Windows apps and websites can't open it — converting to JPG fixes that everywhere.
Yes. Unlike most online converters that upload your photos, this tool runs entirely in your browser. Your images never leave your device.

tools.title: HEIC to PNG Converter — Free & Private

tools.drop: Drop HEIC files here or click to choose

seo.h2: How to convert HEIC to PNG
seo.p: Drop your .heic files above and each becomes a downloadable, lossless PNG instantly.
PNG is lossless and keeps maximum quality, ideal for editing. JPG is smaller and better for sharing. Pick PNG when quality matters most.

seo.p: Drop your .png or .jpg files above, choose a quality level, and download smaller WebP versions.
WebP images are typically 25–35% smaller than PNG/JPG at the same quality. Smaller images mean faster websites and better Core Web Vitals.
